description: Labeled moment-search cases for edgaras-raw when present locally. Text cases need only project.json; scene cases need a current moment index (openklip index edgaras-raw).

cases.note: Expect at least one [cut] match when filler words remain in the transcript.

cases.query: a red sports car on a highway
cases.note: Wrong-topic visual query on talking-head footage should return no scene hits.
Broad visual query; top hit should land within the first 30s when indexed.
